description: Style NoteLend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear.Product DetailsCaramel brown shoe with central lace- ups, overlays and reinforced overlay and pull loop at the heel collarPadded tongue and innerThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with geometrical shaped lugs and an arched midfoot Material and CareLeatherWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under direct sunlight
